grant_title: Evelyn W. Preston Memorial Fund – Connecticut
eligible_applicant_type: Nonprofit organizations (arts organizations, social service agencies, senior centers, faith-based organizations, folk societies, cultural centers)
Individual artists (in partnership with a nonprofit organization or church serving as fiscal sponsor)
project_area: Music concerts in parks and public places for the general public
demographic_requirements: Open to the general public; no specific demographic requirements stated
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations with IRS Tax Determination letter 501(c)(3), individual artists with fiscal sponsorship, concerts must feature 2+ instruments and be held in Hartford parks or public spaces
